title: HELPING CHILDREN EXPOSED TO BATTERERS - 211info
text: ILLINOIS VALLEY SAFE HOUSE ALLIANCE HELPING CHILDREN EXPOSED TO BATTERERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting skills classes in order to teach parents to talk to and listen to their children about their experiences with domestic violence. Rather than a comprehensive parenting skills class, the focus is upon domestic violence and how it relates to parenting issues. Child care and transportation may be arranged. 103 S Kerby Avenue Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers who have experienced domestic violence Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 592-2515 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 592-2515 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across from the City of Cave Junction building, next to the Cave Junction Post Office. Services: Parenting Skills Classes * Domestic Violence Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SURVIVOR ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ILLINOIS VALLEY SAFE HOUSE ALLIANCE
